Operation 'delete-/automation/v4/actions/{appId}/{definitionId}/functions/{functionType}/{functionId}_archive' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. The operation has no description, making it difficult for AI agents to understand its purpose and effects. The summary 'Archive a function' is clear but the missing description creates ambiguity about whether this is a soft delete, what parameters are required, what the response contains, and whether the action is reversible. Added comprehensive description explaining the archival behavior, required parameters, side effects, and reversibility to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_summary: Archive a function for a definition
data.description_suggestion: Archives a function within an action definition, effectively disabling it without deletion. Requires the appId, definitionId, functionType, and functionId path parameters. This operation marks the function as archived and removes it from active use in the definition. Returns a success response. Archived functions can be restored by unarchiving.
data.reasoning: The operation has no description, making it difficult for AI agents to understand its purpose and effects. The summary 'Archive a function' is clear but the missing description creates ambiguity about whether this is a soft delete, what parameters are required, what the response contains, and whether the action is reversible. Added comprehensive description explaining the archival behavior, required parameters, side effects, and reversibility to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'delete-/automation/v4/actions/{appId}/{definitionId}/functions/{functionType}_archiveByFunctionType' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity about scope (deletes by type, not by ID) and side effects. Summary doesn't indicate the 'by type' aspect. Added context about what gets deleted, which definition is affected, and the consequence of deletion for AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Delete a function for a definition
data.current_description: Delete a function within a given definition.
data.summary_suggestion: Delete function by type from definition
data.description_suggestion: Removes a function of the specified type from an action definition. This operation deletes all functions matching the given function type within the definition identified by appId and definitionId. The function will no longer be available for use in the action.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about scope (deletes by type, not by ID) and side effects. Summary doesn't indicate the 'by type' aspect. Added context about what gets deleted, which definition is affected, and the consequence of deletion for AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'get-/automation/v4/actions/{appId}/{definitionId}_getById' has semantic quality issues: inconsistent_terminology, vague_description. Summary uses 'extension definition' which is inconsistent with API terminology ('action definition' used elsewhere). Description is vague about what is returned. Updated to use consistent 'action definition' terminology and clarified the scope of returned data for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Retrieve a custom workflow action definition by ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a complete action definition by its ID. Returns the full definition including all properties, labels, functions, and field configurations for the specified action.
data.reasoning: Summary uses 'extension definition' which is inconsistent with API terminology ('action definition' used elsewhere). Description is vague about what is returned. Updated to use consistent 'action definition' terminology and clarified the scope of returned data for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'delete-/automation/v4/actions/{appId}/{definitionId}_archive' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, inconsistent_terminology, missing_side_effects. Summary says 'Archive' but description says 'Delete' - inconsistent terminology. Description lacks clarity about permanence and side effects. Updated summary to match description and clarified that deletion is permanent and irreversible for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Delete an action definition by ID.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes an action definition by ID. This operation removes the definition and makes it unavailable for use in workflows. The action definition cannot be recovered after deletion.
data.reasoning: Summary says 'Archive' but description says 'Delete' - inconsistent terminology. Description lacks clarity about permanence and side effects. Updated summary to match description and clarified that deletion is permanent and irreversible for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'patch-/automation/v4/actions/{appId}/{definitionId}_update' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary uses 'extension' inconsistently. Description is too generic and doesn't explain PATCH semantics (partial updates). Added clarity about partial update support, request schema reference, and return value for better AI agent understanding of when to use PATCH vs PUT.

data.current_description: Update an existing action definition by ID.
data.description_suggestion: Partially updates an existing action definition by ID. Supports selective field updates using the PublicActionDefinitionPatch schema - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated action definition with all current properties.
data.reasoning: Summary uses 'extension' inconsistently. Description is too generic and doesn't explain PATCH semantics (partial updates). Added clarity about partial update support, request schema reference, and return value for better AI agent understanding of when to use PATCH vs PUT.

message: Operation 'put-/automation/v4/actions/{appId}/{definitionId}/functions/{functionType}/{functionId}_createOrReplace' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, inconsistent_terminology, missing_context. Summary says 'Insert' but description says 'Update' and operation ID indicates 'createOrReplace'. Inconsistent terminology creates confusion. Description doesn't explain PUT semantics (idempotent create-or-replace behavior). Clarified the operation's true behavior and added context about what happens in each scenario for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Insert a function for a definition
data.current_description: Update a function for a given definition by ID.
data.summary_suggestion: Create or replace function in definition
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new function or replaces an existing function in an action definition. Uses PUT semantics - if the function exists, it will be completely replaced; if it doesn't exist, it will be created. Returns the created or updated function object.
data.reasoning: Summary says 'Insert' but description says 'Update' and operation ID indicates 'createOrReplace'. Inconsistent terminology creates confusion. Description doesn't explain PUT semantics (idempotent create-or-replace behavior). Clarified the operation's true behavior and added context about what happens in each scenario for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieve custom workflow action definitions by app ID.

Returns a paginated collection of PublicActionDefinition objects containing action metadata, input/output fields, and configuration details.

Enhanced version clarifies pagination support, specifies the app ID requirement, and indicates the response schema for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Create a new custom workflow action.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new custom workflow action definition
data.description_suggestion: Create a new custom workflow action definition for the specified app. Accepts a PublicActionDefinitionEgg request body containing action metadata, input/output field definitions, and execution configuration. Returns the created PublicActionDefinition object with a generated definition ID. The new action becomes immediately available for use in workflows.
data.reasoning: Summary uses 'extension definition' instead of consistent 'action definition' terminology. Description lacks input schema details, return value information, and side effects (action availability). data.current_summary: Insert a function for a definition
data.current_description: Add a function for a given definition.
data.summary_suggestion: Create or replace a function for an action definition
data.description_suggestion: Create a new function or replace an existing function of a specified type for a given action definition. Requires app ID, definition ID, and function type as path parameters. Accepts a request body containing the function configuration. Returns the created or updated PublicActionFunction object. If a function of the specified type already exists, it will be replaced.
